channel.title: Home on AITechReviews
channel.description: Recent content in Home on AITechReviews

item.title: Best Armor Sets in AC Odyssey (Complete Guide)
item.description:
Best Armor Sets in AC Odyssey

Choosing the right armor set is important for maximizing your build in Assassin’s Creed Odyssey.

Best Assassin Armor

Pirate Set

Best for stealth builds.

Bonuses:

  • Assassin damage
  • Adrenaline generation

Best Warrior Armor

Spartan War Hero Set

Perfect for melee combat.

Bonuses:

  • Warrior damage
  • Weapon damage

Best Hunter Armor

Artemis Set

Ideal for bow-focused builds.

Bonuses:

  • Hunter damage
  • Headshot damage

How to Get Legendary Armor

Legendary armor comes from:

item.title: Easiest Way to Upgrade Your Ship in AC Odyssey
item.description:
Easiest Way to Upgrade Your Ship in AC Odyssey

Ship upgrades require large amounts of resources in Assassin’s Creed Odyssey.

This guide explains how to farm them quickly.

Required Resources

Ship upgrades need:

  • Olive wood
  • Iron metal
  • Obsidian glass
  • Ancient tablets
  • Drachmae

Best Resource Farming Methods

Sink Pirate Ships

Pirate ships give large rewards.

Look for ships around:

  • Kephallonia
  • Korinthia
  • Aegean Sea

Board Instead of Destroy

Boarding ships gives:

  • More loot
  • Extra resources
  • Additional drachmae

Loot Nation Chests

Nation chests give:

item.title: Fastest Way to Earn Money in AC Odyssey (2026 Guide)
item.description:
Fastest Way to Earn Money in AC Odyssey

If you are struggling to upgrade your gear or ship in Assassin’s Creed Odyssey, this guide explains the fastest ways to earn drachmae.

Drachmae are required for:

  • Ship upgrades
  • Weapon upgrades
  • Armor improvements
  • Blacksmith services

Using the methods below, you can earn large amounts of money quickly.

Quick Overview

Best money methods in AC Odyssey:

  • Athens wall runs
  • Mercenary farming
  • Fort raids
  • Selling epic gear

Athens Wall Run (Best Early Game Method)

Athens has one of the longest continuous walls in the game.

item.title: Use of Cookies Policy
item.description:
Last Updated: March 2, 2026

Welcome to AITechReviews (“we,” “our,” or “us”). This Use of Cookies Policy explains how we use cookies and similar technologies when you visit our website.

By continuing to browse or use our website, you agree to our use of cookies as described in this policy.

1. What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, smartphone, tablet) when you visit a website. They help websites function properly, improve performance, and provide information to the site owner.

item.title: About Us
item.description:
AI-Tech-Reviews – Smart Tech. Honest Gaming. Clear Decisions.

Welcome to AI-Tech-Reviews, your trusted destination for in-depth tech reviews, AI tool analysis, and honest gaming content.

We break down the latest smartphones, laptops, AI software, gadgets, and emerging technologies — helping you make smarter buying decisions without the hype.

But we don’t stop at hardware.

🎮 We also deliver:

  • Honest gaming reviews
  • Complete game walkthroughs
  • Achievement & trophy guides
  • Performance analysis (FPS, optimization, settings)
  • Gaming tips for PC & console players

From AI tools to AAA titles, every review and walkthrough is structured, research-backed, and focused on real-world experience.

item.title: Affiliate Disclosure
item.description:
AITechReviews may include affiliate links in certain articles, reviews, and guides.

If you click an affiliate link and make a purchase, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.

These commissions help support our work and keep our content free.

Our editorial opinions remain independent, and we recommend products based on research and real-world value.

item.title: Contact Us
item.description: Have questions, suggestions, or feedback? Use the form below and we will get back to you.

item.title: How It Works
item.description:
Our Review Process

✔ Real-world performance testing

✔ Clear Pros & Cons breakdown

✔ Transparent rating system

✔ No sponsored manipulation

✔ Updated for 2026 market

item.title: PP
item.description:
Placeholder content for PP page.

Effective Date: March 1, 2026

We may collect:

  • Personal information (such as name or email address if you contact us)
  • Non-personal data such as browser type, device type, and pages visited
  • Analytics data through third-party tools

We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to others.

2. Cookies

Our website may use cookies to:

  • Improve user experience
  • Analyze website traffic
  • Track affiliate referrals

You can disable cookies in your browser settings.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Privacy Policy

Effective Date: March 1, 2026

Welcome to AITechReviews (“we,” “our,” or “us”). Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you visit our website.

1. Information We Collect

We may collect:

  • Personal information (such as name or email address if you contact us)
  • Non-personal data such as browser type, device type, and pages visited
  • Analytics data through third-party tools

We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to others.
